1	apiVersion: batch/v1
2	kind: Job
3	metadata:
4	  name: spark-skew-broadcast
5	  namespace: spark-skew
6	spec:
7	  backoffLimit: 0
8	  template:
9	    metadata:
10	      labels:
11	        app: spark-skew
12	        strategy: broadcast
13	    spec:
14	      serviceAccountName: spark
15	      restartPolicy: Never
16	      containers:
17	      - name: spark-skew
18	        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
19	        env:
20	        - name: STRATEGY
21	          value: "broadcast"
22	        command:
23	        - /bin/bash
24	        - -c
25	        - |
26	          set -e
27	          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
28	          echo "STRATEGY=broadcast (broadcast small products table, avoids skewed shuffle)"
29	          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
30	          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
31	            --master local[2] \
32	            --conf spark.sql.autoBroadcastJoinThreshold=10485760 \
33	            /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
34	          echo "spark_skew_broadcast_complete"
35	        resources:
36	          requests:
37	            cpu: 200m
38	            memory: 256Mi
39	          limits:
40	            cpu: 500m
41	            memory: 512Mi
42

file.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-broadcast
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: broadcast
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      restartPolicy: Never
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: "broadcast"
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=broadcast (broadcast small products table, avoids skewed shuffle)"
          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --conf spark.sql.autoBroadcastJoinThreshold=10485760 \
            /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
          echo "spark_skew_broadcast_complete"
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-aqe
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: aqe
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      restartPolicy: Never
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: "aqe"
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=aqe (Adaptive Query Execution auto-splits skewed partitions)"
          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_aqe.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=true \
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.enabled=true \
            /tmp/skew_aqe.py
          echo "spark_skew_aqe_complete"
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-baseline
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: baseline
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      restartPolicy: Never
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: "baseline"
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=baseline (no optimization, skew_ratio=10x, slow)"
          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_baseline.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=false \
            /tmp/skew_baseline.py
          echo "spark_skew_baseline_complete"
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

16	kind: Deployment
17	metadata:

19	  namespace: spark-skew
20	spec:
21	  replicas: 1
22	  selector:
23	    matchLabels:
24	      app: spark-master
25	  template:
26	    metadata:
27	      labels:
28	        app: spark-master
29	        component: master
30	    spec:
31	      serviceAccountName: spark
32	      containers:
33	      - name: spark-master

35	        command:
36	        - /bin/bash

39	          unset SPARK_MASTER_PORT
40	          /opt/spark/sbin/start-master.sh
41	          tail -f /opt/spark/logs/*

file.content:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: spark-master
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  ports:
  - port: 7077
    name: spark
  - port: 8080
    name: webui
  selector:
    app: spark-master
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: spark-master
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: spark-master
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-master
        component: master
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      containers:
      - name: spark-master
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          unset SPARK_MASTER_PORT
          /opt/spark/sbin/start-master.sh
          tail -f /opt/spark/logs/*
        ports:
        - containerPort: 7077
          name: spark
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: webui
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: spark-worker
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: spark-worker
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-worker
        component: worker
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      containers:
      - name: spark-worker
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          /opt/spark/sbin/start-worker.sh spark://spark-master:7077
          tail -f /opt/spark/logs/*
        env:
        - name: SPARK_WORKER_MEMORY
          value: "1G"
        - name: SPARK_WORKER_CORES
          value: "1"
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8081
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi

content.text: Both jobs are starting. I'll poll until they complete.

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  STATUS_B=$(kubectl get job spark-skew-broadcast -n spark-skew -o jsonpath='{.status.conditions[?(@.type=="Complete")].status}' 2>/dev/null)
  STATUS_A=$(kubectl get job spark-skew-aqe -n spark-skew -o jsonpath='{.status.conditions[?(@.type=="Complete")].status}' 2>/dev/null)
  FAILED_B=$(kubectl get job spark-skew-broadcast -n spark-skew -o jsonpath='{.status.conditions[?(@.type=="Failed")].status}' 2>/dev/null)
  FAILED_A=$(kubectl get job spark-skew-aqe -n spark-skew -o jsonpath='{.status.conditions[?(@.type=="Failed")].status}' 2>/dev/null)
  echo "$(date '+%H:%M:%S') broadcast=${STATUS_B:-pending}(failed=${FAILED_B:-no}) aqe=${STATUS_A:-pending}(failed=${FAILED_A:-no})"
  if [ "$STATUS_B" = "True" ] && [ "$STATUS_A" = "True" ]; then
    echo "Both jobs completed!"
    break
  fi
  if [ "$FAILED_B" = "True" ] || [ "$FAILED_A" = "True" ]; then
    echo "A job failed! Check logs."
    break
  fi
  sleep 5
done
input.description: Poll until both broadcast and AQE jobs complete
